_comment: ADR-4 schema adapter. ALL LeadSimple REST specifics live here and nowhere else. Field names are UNVERIFIED until the admin API key arrives - read app.leadsimple.com/api_docs FIRST, then fill url/auth_header/field_map and set enabled=true. While enabled=false, WF-2 routes every lead to the email-parse path, which is launch-sufficient (acceptance G-2).
